reference: Hi, I am seven months pregnant, and when I stand for a long time, my thighs have a burning sensation and it hurts. What should I do? What healthy diet should I have now? I am also not taking iron tablets as they are giving me severe acidity problems. Is there any issue if I have a lower intake of iron? I am consuming calcium tablets daily.
text: Hi, I'm 7 months pregnant and when I stand for a long time, my thighs have a burning sensation and it hurts. What should I do, what healthy diet should I have now? I am also not taking iron tablets as they are giving me severe acidity problems. Is there any issue if I have a lower intake of iron? I am consuming calcium tablets daily.
